diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -6,15 +6,20 @@
 import numpy as np

 

 class SpatioTemporalGCN(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, input_dim=1, hidden_dim=64, output_dim=1, num_nodes=207, num_layers=2, seq_len=12):

+    def __init__(self, input_dim=1, hidden_dim=64, output_dim=1, num_nodes=207, num_layers=2, seq_len=12, adj_matrix=None):

         super(SpatioTemporalGCN, self).__init__()

         

         self.num_nodes = num_nodes

         self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

         self.seq_len = seq_len

         

-        # Convert adjacency matrix to edge index and weights

-        self.edge_index, self.edge_weights = self._get_edge_index_and_weights()

+        # Convert adjacency matrix to edge index and weights if provided

+        if adj_matrix is not None:

+            self.edge_index, self.edge_weights = self._convert_adj_to_edges(adj_matrix)

+        else:

+            # Placeholder - will be updated later

+            self.edge_index = torch.tensor([[0], [0]], dtype=torch.long)

+            self.edge_weights = torch.tensor([0.0], dtype=torch.float)

         

         # Input embedding layer

         self.input_proj = nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim)

@@ -30,13 +35,7 @@
         # Output projection

         self.output_proj = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, output_dim)

         

-    def _get_edge_index_and_weights(self):

-        # Placeholder - will be updated with actual adjacency matrix

-        edge_index = torch.tensor([[0], [0]], dtype=torch.long)  # Empty initially

-        edge_weights = torch.tensor([0.0], dtype=torch.float)

-        return edge_index, edge_weights

-    

-    def set_edge_index_and_weights(self, adj_matrix):

+    def _convert_adj_to_edges(self, adj_matrix):

         # Convert adjacency matrix to edge index format

         adj_tensor = torch.from_numpy(adj_matrix).float()

         

@@ -44,17 +43,15 @@
         edge_index = torch.nonzero(adj_tensor, as_tuple=False).t().contiguous()

         edge_weights = adj_tensor[edge_index[0], edge_index[1]]

         

-        self.edge_index = edge_index.to(torch.long)

-        self.edge_weights = edge_weights

+        return edge_index.to(torch.long), edge_weights

+    

+    def set_edge_index_and_weights(self, adj_matrix):

+        # Convert adjacency matrix to edge index format

+        self.edge_index, self.edge_weights = self._convert_adj_to_edges(adj_matrix)

         

     def forward(self, x):

         # x shape: (batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes)

         batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes = x.shape

-        

-        # Move edge_index and edge_weights to the same device as x

-        device = x.device

-        edge_index = self.edge_index.to(device)

-        edge_weights = self.edge_weights.to(device)

         

         # Process each node through spatial GCN

         outputs = []

@@ -68,8 +65,13 @@
             # Project to hidden dimension

             x_t = self.input_proj(x_t)  # (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)

             

-            # Reshape for GCN: (batch_size * num_nodes, hidden_dim)

+            # Reshape for GCN: reshape to (batch_size * num_nodes, hidden_dim)

             x_t = x_t.view(-1, self.hidden_dim)

+            

+            # Move edge_index and edge_weights to the same device as x

+            device = x_t.device

+            edge_index = self.edge_index.to(device)

+            edge_weights = self.edge_weights.to(device)

             

             # Apply GCN layers

             gcn_out = x_t

@@ -94,6 +96,7 @@
         output = self.output_proj(lstm_out)  # (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)

         

         # Expand to match number of nodes

-        output = output.expand(-1, -1, self.num_nodes)  # (batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes)

+        output = output.unsqueeze(-1).expand(-1, -1, -1, self.num_nodes)  # (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim, num_nodes)

+        output = output.squeeze(2)  # (batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes)

         

         return output

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -89,11 +89,9 @@
         hidden_dim=64,

         output_dim=1,

         num_nodes=207,

-        num_layers=2

+        num_layers=2,

+        adj_matrix=adj_mx  # Pass adjacency matrix during initialization

     ).to(device)

-    

-    # Set up edge indices and weights

-    model.set_edge_index_and_weights(adj_mx)

     

     # Define optimizer and loss function

     optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.001)
